name: code-agent
description: AI-powered code development agent with Claude Agent SDK

scripts.dev: concurrently -n FE,BE,EL -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: npx wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:8000 && npx electron electron/main.js
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npx electron-builder
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
